name: ASHLAND INC.
summary: PART I GENERAL Ashland Inc. is a global additives and specialty ingredients company with a conscious and proactive mindset for sustainability. Our common stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol ASH. The terms Ashland, the Company, we and our used herein refer to Ashland Inc., a Delaware Corporation, and its predecessors, and its consolidated subsidiaries, except where the context indicates otherwise.
